message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate all block labels to unified NameGen system

Replace hardcoded `blk:` labels with unique `__m{id}_xxx:` labels using
the centralized NameGen system to prevent duplicate label compilation
errors when the same codegen function is called multiple times.

Files migrated:
- math_mod.zig, builtins_mod.zig, mod_helper.zig
- posixpath_mod.zig, ntpath_mod.zig, os.zig
- builtins/io.zig, eval.zig, dynamic_attrs.zig, type_checks.zig
- hashlib_mod.zig, for_basic.zig, subscript.zig
- comprehensions.zig, misc.zig, comparison.zig, assign.zig
- And 30+ additional module/method files

Pattern: self.nextNameId() generates unique IDs per block
